text: A district is governed by a board of directors. The board is responsible for the management, operation, and control of the district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.101 — Control of District

A district is governed by a board of directors. The board is responsible for the management, operation, and control of the district.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*
